title: Theoretical Physics Knowledge Network
purpose: Bridge a standalone formal-theory knowledge network into AITP as an explicit Layer 2 backend rather than a hidden side channel.
Support formal-theory promotion packets that write durable concepts, derivations, bridges, methods, and warnings into a separate typed repository.
artifact_granularity: One promoted typed unit together with its source manifest update and any required edge or index rebuild is the atomic backend writeback artifact.
retrieval_hints: Read indexes/unit_index.jsonl, indexes/source_anchor_index.jsonl, and edges/edges.jsonl before any writeback.
Treat the standalone repository as a typed external Layer 2 backend, not as chat memory or a folder dump.
Human-reviewed promotion remains available for L2.
Theory-formal candidates may enter L2_auto only after passing coverage, regression, and multi-agent consensus gates.
notes: This card documents the public bridge from AITP into the standalone Theoretical-Physics-Knowledge-Network repository, including the theory-specific L2_auto path.
